query:
UPDATE stocks 
SET ytdStartPrice = CASE 
  WHEN ticker = 'ADEN.SW' THEN 22.36
  WHEN ticker = 'AMGN' THEN 309.00
END
WHERE ticker IN ('ADEN.SW', 'AMGN');
